properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Search me, Oh God! my actions try, And let my life appear As seen by Thine all-searching eye To mine my ways make clear.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Search all my sense, and know my heart, Who only canst' make known, And let the deep, the hidden part To me be fully shown

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Throw light into the darkened cells Where passion reigns within; Quicken my conscience till it feels The loathsomeness of sin.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Search all my thoughts, the secret springs, The motives that control; The chambers where polluted things Hold empire o’er the soul.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Search, till Thy fiery glance has cast It's holy light through all, And I by grace am brought at last Before Thy face to fall.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Thus prostrate I shall learn of Thee What now I feebly prove, That God alone in Christ can be Unutterable love!
